text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Summer camp starts today! Sakura Chiyono O
and Mejiro Ardan tell Yaeno Muteki about their
injuries and recovery in detail.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Although they are able to train, it seems like it'll
be a while before either can compete in a race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Yaeno Muteki swears to do them both proud at
the Kikuka Sho.
